properties.verseOrder: v1 v2 v3 v4 v5 v5

verse.name: v1
verse.lines: Be exalted oh Lord our God, Be Exalted oh Lord our God, Oh yes you reign, Oh oh oh oh, Oh oh oh oh, Oh oh oh oh, We lift you up, Oh oh oh oh, Oh oh oh oh, Oh oh oh oh,

verse.name: v2
verse.lines: Be exalted oh Lord our God, Be Exalted oh Lord our God, Oh yes you reign, Be exalted oh Lord our God, Be Exalted oh Lord our God, Oh yes you reign, We lift you up, Oh oh oh oh, Oh oh oh oh, Oh oh oh oh, We lift you up, Oh oh oh oh, Oh oh oh oh, Oh oh oh oh, We lift you up,

verse.name: v3
verse.lines: Mighty, Saviour, Faithful, Jesus, Mighty (you never fail), Saviour (you love endures), Faithful (you never change), Jesus (our God forever) Mighty (you never fail), Saviour (you love endures), Faithful (you never change), Jesus (our God forever)

verse.name: v4
verse.lines: We lift you up, We lift you up, We lift you up Be exalted oh Lord our God, Be Exalted oh Lord our God, Oh yes you reign, Be exalted oh Lord our God, Be Exalted oh Lord our God, Oh yes you reign,

verse.name: v5
verse.lines: We lift you up, Over all, You're the name above all names, We lift you up, Uwahili malo Lubanga wa, You're the name above all names, We lift you up
